channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Splatoon Raiders launches July 23
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Splat scores of enemies and hunt for treasure.

Splatoon Raiders will launch for Switch 2 on July 23, Nintendo announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Nintendo:

Splatoon Raiders is a single-player-focused action shooter for Splatoon veterans and newcomers alike. You take on the role of a mechanic embarking on a high-stakes adventure across the mysterious Spirhalite Islands.

Customize your appearance and your loadout and get ready to raid the islands for treasure. Using a variety of mechanical gadgets and ink-splattering weapons you’ll splat scores of enemies called Salmonids, conquer raids and salvage loot on your journey through the one-of-a-kind Splatoon universe.

  • ❮
  • ❯

But you won’t be alone—you’ll be working with Frye, Shiver and Big Man, a trio of swashbuckling musicians who make up the splat-tacular band Deep Cut. In fact, one member of the band will raid alongside you in a powerful bot! And speaking of Deep Cut, brand-new amiibo figures1 featuring Frye, Shiver and Big Man sporting their new looks2 from Splatoon Raiders will also be available when the game launches July 23.

The game also supports the ability to join with up to three other players online3 or via local wireless4.

Pre-orders for Splatoon Raiders will be available today on My Nintendo Store and Nintendo eShop on Nintendo Switch 2. The Deep Cut amiibo will be available for pre-order today on My Nintendo Store.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Release Date Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/splatoon-raiders-launches-july-23
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Penguin Colony adds Switch 2 version, published by Fellow Traveller
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch 2

Due out in 2026.

Fellow Traveler will publish Origame Digital-developed Lovecraftian narrative adventure game Penguin Colony when it launches for Switch 2 and PC via Steam in 2026, the companies announced. The Switch 2 version is newly announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Fellow Traveller:

Penguin Colony is a Lovecraftian narrative experience from Origame Digital, the creator of Umurangi Generation.

A reimagining of Lovecraftian stories such as At the Mountains of Madness, Penguin Colony offers a radically different perspective on creeping cosmic horror by telling it through the eyes of a penguin.

Set in the frozen expanse of Antarctica, you will explore open-ended environments by waddling, sliding, and swimming across the ice. As you uncover the fate of two factions that have been drawn to Antarctica. One seeks to harness the power of an ancient being beyond their comprehension, while the other wants to return it to its slumber.

  • ❮
  • ❯

You will discover and play as different penguins, each with unique abilities and limitations that influence exploration. Some penguins may access tight, hidden spaces, while others can traverse the icy waters, offering multiple perspectives on the world and its mysteries.

As you progress, you will gain insight about two factions that are drawn to Antarctica by forces beyond comprehension. The story unfolds through environmental discovery and narration, gradually revealing a deeper, unsettling truth buried beneath the ice.

Penguin Colony will feature a playable demo during the Summer Game Fest window, as part of June’s Steam Next Fest and Fellow Traveller’s Story Rich Showcase.

The game will launch with day one localization in Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Brazilian Portuguese, Arabic, and Te Reo Māori.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Publisher Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/penguin-colony-adds-switch-2-version-published-by-fellow-traveller
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: NieR series 15th anniversary trailer
item.content:encoded:
First unveiled at the NieR 15th Anniversary Exhibition in August 2025.

Square Enix has released the NieR series 15th anniversary trailer, which was first showcased at the “NieR 15th Anniversary Exhibition: Unerasable Records” held in Ikebukuro, Tokyo back in August 2025.

The NieR series celebrated its 15th anniversary on April 22, 2010.

Watch the trailer below.

NieR Series 15th Anniversary Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/nier-series-15th-anniversary-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: RATATAN physical edition pre-orders now available
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch 2

Rhythmic roguelike action game due out on July 16.

Pre-orders for the physical edition of rhythmic roguelike action game Ratatan are now available for PlayStation 5 and Switch 2 in North America and Europe at every major retailer, publisher Game Source Entertainment and developer Ratata Arts announced.

Here are the details:

Physical Edition

  • Release Date: July 16, 2026
  • Supported Platforms: PlayStation 5, Switch 2
  • Suggested Retail Price:
    • PlayStation 5 – $39.99 / €39.99 / £34.99
    • Switch 2 – $39.99 / €44.99 / £39.99
  • Availability: Available to pre-order from every major retailer

Digital Editions

Pre-orders are currently open for the physical edition only; pre-orders for the digital version have not yet begun.

  • Standard Edition
    • Platforms: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PC
    • Price: $34.99 / €34.99 / £34.99
    • Contents:
      • Main game
      • Early purchase bonus: Legendary Weapon “Spirit Sword Banbansord”
  • Deluxe Edition
  • Platforms: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PC
  • Price: $39.99 / €39.99 / £39.99 GBP
  • Contents:
    • Main game
    • Early purchase bonus: Legendary Weapon “Spirit Sword Banbansord”
    • Special Weapon and Accessory Set
    • Cobun Set
    • Growth Material Set
    • Content included in the Deluxe Edition will also be available to purchase separately at launch

Here is a brief overview of the game, via Game Source Entertainment:

Ratatan is a rhythmic rogue-lite packed with beat-driven battles and colorful chaos. This exciting new release challenges players to build their own customisable Cobun army, march across the everchanging world of Redo and defeat any evildoers silly enough to stand in their way; supporting both single-player and multiplayer.

Ratatan is currently in Early Access for PC, and will launch in version 1.0 for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam on July 16.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/ratatan-physical-edition-pre-orders-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
